segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translation.text: 听录音，然后回答以下问题。

segments.text: Why was the village silent?

translation.text: 这个村庄为什么一片寂静？

segments.text: In this much-traveled world, there are still thousands of places which are inaccessible to tourists.

translation.text: 在这个足迹遍布的世界里，仍有成千上万个游客无法到达的地方。

segments.text: We always assume that villagers in remote places are friendly and hospitable.

translation.text: 我们总以为偏远地区的村民友好好客。

segments.text: But people who are cut-off

translation.text: 但与世隔绝的人们

segments.text: Visits to really remote villages are seldom enjoyable, as my wife and I discovered during a tour through the Balkans.

translation.text: 去真正偏僻的村庄游览很少令人愉快，我和妻子在巴尔干半岛旅行时就发现了这一点。

segments.text: We had spent several days in a small town, and visited a number of old churches in the vicinity.

translation.text: 我们在一座小镇住了几天，参观了附近几座古老教堂。

segments.text: These attracted many visitors, for they were not only of great architectural interest, but contained a large number of preserved frescoes as well.

translation.text: 这些教堂吸引了许多游客，因为它们不仅在建筑上极有价值，还保存着大量壁画。

segments.text: On the day before our departure, several busloads of tourists descended on the town.

translation.text: 出发前一天，几辆满载游客的大巴突然涌入小镇。

segments.text: This was more than we could bear, so we decided to spend our last day exploring the countryside.

translation.text: 这实在令我们无法忍受，于是决定用最后一天去探索乡间。

segments.text: Taking a path which led out of the town, we crossed a few fields until we came to a dense wood.

translation.text: 我们沿一条通往镇外的小路走去，穿过几块田地，来到一片茂密的树林。

segments.text: We expected the path to end abruptly, but we found that it traced its way through the trees.

translation.text: 我们原以为小路会突然中断，却发现它蜿蜒穿过树林。

segments.text: We tramped through the wood for over two hours until we arrived at a deep stream.

translation.text: 我们在林中跋涉了两个多小时，来到一条很深的溪流旁。

segments.text: We could see that the path continued on the other side, but we had no idea how we could get across the stream.

translation.text: 我们看得见小路在对岸继续延伸，却不知道怎样渡过溪流。

segments.text: Suddenly, my wife spotted a boat moored to the bank.

translation.text: 突然，妻子发现岸边系着一条船。

segments.text: In it, there was a boatman fast asleep.

translation.text: 船上有个船夫正在酣睡。

segments.text: We gently woke him up, and asked him to ferry us to the other side.

translation.text: 我们轻轻叫醒他，请他把我们摆渡到对岸。

segments.text: Though he was reluctant to do so at first, we eventually persuaded him to take us.

translation.text: 起初他不愿意，最后我们还是说服了他。

segments.text: The path led to a tiny village perched on the steep sides of a mountain.

translation.text: 小路通向一个坐落在陡峭山坡上的小村庄。

segments.text: The place consisted of a straggling, unmade road which was lined on either side by small houses.

translation.text: 村里只有一条参差延伸、没有铺设的道路，两旁排列着小房子。

segments.text: Even under a clear blue sky, the village looked forbidding, as all the houses were built of gray mud bricks.

translation.text: 即使在晴朗的蓝天下，村庄仍显得阴森，因为所有房屋都是灰色土砖建成的。

segments.text: The village seemed deserted, the only sign of life, being an ugly-looking black goat on a short length of rope tied to a tree in a field nearby.

translation.text: 村庄似乎空无一人，唯一的生命迹象是附近田里一只样子丑陋的黑山羊，被一小段绳子拴在树上。

segments.text: Sitting down on a dilapidated wooden fence near the field, we opened a couple of tins of sardines and had a picnic lunch.

translation.text: 我们在田边一段破旧的木栅栏上坐下，打开两罐沙丁鱼，吃起野餐午饭。

segments.text: All at once, I noticed that my wife seemed to be filled with alarm.

translation.text: 我突然注意到妻子似乎惊恐万分。

segments.text: Looking up, I saw that we were surrounded by children in rags who were looking at us silently as we ate.

translation.text: 抬头一看，只见一群衣衫褴褛的孩子把我们围住，在我们吃东西时默默看着。

segments.text: We offered them food and spoke to them kindly, but they remained motionless.

translation.text: 我们把食物给他们，并友善地同他们说话，但他们仍一动不动。

segments.text: I concluded that they were simply shy of strangers.

translation.text: 我断定他们只是见到陌生人害羞。

segments.text: When we later walked down the main street of the village, we were followed by a silent procession of children.

translation.text: 后来我们沿村里的大街走去，身后跟着一队沉默的孩子。

segments.text: The village which had seemed deserted immediately came to life.

translation.text: 刚才还像是空无一人的村庄立刻活了起来。

segments.text: appeared at windows, men in shirtsleeves stood outside their houses and glared at us.

translation.text: 女人出现在窗口，穿衬衫的男人站在屋外怒视我们。

segments.text: Old women in black shawls peered at us from doorways.

translation.text: 披黑色披肩的老妇人从门口窥视我们。

segments.text: The most frightening thing of all was that not a sound could be heard.

translation.text: 最可怕的是听不到任何声音。

segments.text: There was no doubt that we were unwelcome visitors.

translation.text: 毫无疑问，我们是不受欢迎的来客。

segments.text: We needed no further warning.

translation.text: 我们不需要更多警告。

segments.text: Turning back down the main street, we quickened our pace and made our way rapidly towards the stream where we hoped the boatman was waiting.

translation.text: 我们转身沿大街往回走，加快脚步，迅速赶往溪边，希望船夫还在那里等候。
